entries.name: CAPM®
entries.desc: Certified Associate in Project Management - Entry level fundamentals.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Certified Associate in Project Management - Entry level fundamentals.
entries.recommendedCta: Earn your CAPM — complete the 23 hours, practice with exam-style questions, and schedule with confidence.
entries.targetAudience: Early-career PMs, coordinators, graduates, career-changers; 'no experience required.'

entries.name: PMP®
entries.desc: Project Management Professional — structured PMI exam-preparation support for experienced project leaders.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Project Management Professional — structured PMI exam-preparation support for experienced project leaders.
entries.outputValue: Core flagship / strongest broad PM value
entries.recommendedCta: Check eligibility and start your PMP path — build a plan, train to 35+ hours, and book your exam.
entries.targetAudience: Project managers leading cross-functional teams; professionals seeking a globally recognized PM credential.

entries.name: PMI-ACP®
entries.desc: Agile Certified Practitioner - Agile principles and practices.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Agile Certified Practitioner - Agile principles and practices.
entries.recommendedCta: Prove your agile delivery skills — validate experience, complete 21 hours, and book your PMI-ACP exam.
entries.targetAudience: Scrum masters, product owners, agile team leads, PMs in agile/hybrid delivery.

entries.name: PMI-RMP®
entries.desc: Risk Management Professional - Advanced risk management.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Risk Management Professional - Advanced risk management.
entries.recommendedCta: Become the risk specialist teams rely on — meet the 40-hour education requirement and validate your risk leadership.
entries.targetAudience: Risk leads, PMs on complex projects, PMO/portfolio risk professionals.

entries.name: PMI-PBA®
entries.desc: Professional in Business Analysis.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Professional in Business Analysis.
entries.outputValue: BA + requirements specialist / strong business value
entries.recommendedCta: Formalize your BA leadership — meet the 35 contact hours and prepare with role-based cases.
entries.targetAudience: Business analysts, product/business analysis leads, PMs doing requirements/benefits work.

entries.name: PMI-SP®
entries.desc: Scheduling Professional - Advanced scheduling and planning.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Scheduling Professional - Advanced scheduling and planning.
entries.recommendedCta: Own the schedule — meet eligibility, train to the required hours, and master control techniques.
entries.targetAudience: Planners/schedulers, controls engineers, PMs in complex schedule-driven environments.

entries.name: PMI-PMOCP™
entries.desc: PMO Certified Professional - Governance and maturity.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: PMO Certified Professional - Governance and maturity.
entries.recommendedCta: Design and run a value-driven PMO — hit the 10-hour requirement and prepare for PMI-PMOCP.
entries.targetAudience: PMO managers, PMO leads, transformation/portfolio governance professionals.

entries.name: Construction Professional (PMI-CP)™
entries.desc: Construction Professional - Built environment leadership.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Construction Professional - Built environment leadership.
entries.recommendedCta: Become PMI-CP ready — complete the four modules, validate experience, and master construction delivery.
entries.targetAudience: Construction PMs, site/project controls leaders, built-environment delivery roles.

entries.name: Managing AI (PMI-CPMAI)™
entries.desc: AI in Project Management - Future-facing leadership.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: AI in Project Management - Future-facing leadership.
entries.recommendedCta: Lead AI projects with structure — complete the 21-hour track and prove PMI-CPMAI readiness.
entries.targetAudience: PMs, technologists, data/AI professionals, consultants delivering AI initiatives.

entries.name: Green Project Manager – Basic (GPM-b)™
entries.desc: Green Project Manager - Sustainable project delivery.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Green Project Manager - Sustainable project delivery.
entries.recommendedCta: Add sustainability to your PM toolkit — confirm eligibility and complete the GPM-b pathway.
entries.targetAudience: PMs adding sustainability capability; professionals needing ethics/sustainability framing within PM work.

entries.name: PgMP®
entries.desc: Program Management Professional.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Program Management Professional.
entries.recommendedCta: Move from projects to programs — validate experience, pass panel review, and lead strategic outcomes.
entries.targetAudience: Senior program managers; PMO leaders responsible for program governance and benefits delivery.

entries.name: PfMP®
entries.desc: Portfolio Management Professional.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Portfolio Management Professional.
entries.recommendedCta: Lead portfolio decisions with confidence — master governance and performance at the executive level.
entries.targetAudience: Portfolio managers, PMO directors, strategy execution leaders.

entries.name: PRINCE2® 7 Foundation
entries.desc: Projects in Controlled Environments - Process-based method.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Projects in Controlled Environments - Process-based method.
entries.recommendedCta: Learn PRINCE2 governance fast — start with Foundation and build a controlled delivery mindset.
entries.targetAudience: PMs, team leads, analysts, coordinators; organizations standardizing project governance language.

entries.name: PRINCE2® 7 Practitioner
entries.desc: Advanced application of the PRINCE2 method.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Advanced application of the PRINCE2 method.
entries.recommendedCta: Move from theory to application — become PRINCE2 Practitioner-ready with scenario drills.
entries.targetAudience: Practicing PMs and delivery leads implementing PRINCE2 governance in real projects.

entries.name: PRINCE2 Agile® Foundation
entries.desc: Structured agile governance value.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Structured agile governance value.
entries.recommendedCta: Run agile projects with governance — master PRINCE2 Agile Foundation fast.
entries.targetAudience: PMs, agile leads, teams operating in hybrid governance environments.

entries.name: PRINCE2 Agile® Practitioner
entries.desc: Advanced application of PRINCE2 Agile.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Advanced application of PRINCE2 Agile.
entries.recommendedCta: Prove you can tailor governance for agility — become PRINCE2 Agile Practitioner-ready.
entries.targetAudience: PMs and leads delivering agile work under formal governance.

entries.name: MSP®
entries.desc: Managing Successful Programmes.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Managing Successful Programmes.

entries.name: MoP®
entries.desc: Management of Portfolios.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Management of Portfolios.

entries.name: M_o_R®
entries.desc: Management of Risk.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Management of Risk.

entries.name: P3O®
entries.desc: Portfolio, Programme and Project Offices.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Portfolio, Programme and Project Offices.

entries.name: Six Sigma White Belt
entries.desc: Awareness-level introduction to Six Sigma language and basic improvement thinking.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Awareness-level introduction to Six Sigma language and basic improvement thinking.
entries.recommendedCta: Get Six Sigma fluent — start with an executive-friendly White Belt foundation.
entries.targetAudience: Entire organization awareness; new joiners; cross-functional teams.

entries.name: Six Sigma Yellow Belt (CSSYB)
entries.desc: Foundational Six Sigma credential for supporting improvement projects.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Foundational Six Sigma credential for supporting improvement projects.
entries.recommendedCta: Start your Six Sigma journey — build the fundamentals and earn CSSYB readiness.
entries.targetAudience: Team members supporting projects; professionals new to structured process improvement.

entries.name: Six Sigma Green Belt (CSSGB)
entries.desc: Validates competence to lead smaller improvement projects using DMAIC.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Validates competence to lead smaller improvement projects using DMAIC.
entries.recommendedCta: Lead measurable improvements — build Green Belt capability with structured practice.
entries.targetAudience: Process improvement leads, operations excellence roles, quality professionals leading projects.

entries.name: Six Sigma Black Belt (CSSBB)
entries.desc: Advanced credential for leading complex improvement projects and coaching teams.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Advanced credential for leading complex improvement projects and coaching teams.
entries.recommendedCta: Lead complex transformations — become ASQ Black Belt-ready with intensive practice.
entries.targetAudience: Senior improvement leaders; quality/OpEx professionals leading cross-functional projects.

entries.name: Master Black Belt (CMBB)
entries.desc: Top-tier credential with portfolio review plus exam and performance-based assessment.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Top-tier credential with portfolio review plus exam and performance-based assessment.
entries.recommendedCta: Move into enterprise excellence leadership — prepare your portfolio and master the CMBB bar.
entries.targetAudience: Senior MBBs / senior CSSBBs with deep enterprise deployment and mentoring experience.

entries.name: Six Sigma Champion
entries.desc: Executive/leadership role focused on selecting projects and sponsoring benefits realization.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Executive/leadership role focused on selecting projects and sponsoring benefits realization.
entries.recommendedCta: Sponsor transformation, not just training — become an effective Six Sigma Champion.
entries.targetAudience: Directors, functional leaders, transformation sponsors, PMO/OpEx sponsors.

entries.name: Foundation Direct Pathway
entries.desc: Foundational vocabulary across PMI, PRINCE2, and Six Sigma — best explored after a pathway consultation to confirm fit.
entries.detailHeroSubtitle: Foundational vocabulary across PMI, PRINCE2, and Six Sigma — best explored after a pathway consultation to confirm fit.
entries.targetAudience: Fresh graduates, career changers, and executives needing a quick PM bridge.
